message:
feat: LSH error clustering with MinHash + Union-Find (wa-283h4.11)

MinHash locality-sensitive hashing clusters similar errors across panes
in real-time: 128 hash functions, 16 bands × 8 rows (~0.7 Jaccard
threshold), FNV-1a shingling, weighted union-find with path compression.
20 tests including 4 proptest suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
